sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_buildId (id UInt32, build_id String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_buildId (id, build_id) VALUES (1, buildId()), (2, buildId());
UPDATE test_buildId SET build_id = buildId() WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, build_id FROM test_buildId WHERE build_id = buildId();
